version_description: Includes the 'Angels 2020' updated lyrics. Key is the same as the original. https://youtu.be/C08gOyASz2U.
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Never Surrender (Angels 2020)
Corey Hart

Note:  Transpose to C (down 2) and then capo 2 for easier chords.
       Also, open A can be substitued for the A4 - A7 in the latter part of the song,
       and if that doesn't have the right feel, try holding G through to the next D

[Intro]
[ch]D[/ch]  [ch]F#m[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]
[ch]D[/ch]  [ch]F#m[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]

[Verse]

[tab][ch]D[/ch]  [ch]F#m[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]
Oh No No No Yeah[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                   [ch]F#m[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
 Just a little more time is all we're asking for[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                         [ch]F#m[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]
 Cause just a little more time can open closing doors[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]            [ch]F#m[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
 A little uncertainty can bring you down[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
 Nobody wants to know you now[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                             [ch]A7[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]
 And nobody wants to show you how...[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                         [ch]G[/ch]
So if you're lost and on your own[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
You can never surrender[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                             [ch]G[/ch]
 And if your path won't lead you home[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
You can never surrender[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]               [ch]Bm[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]
 And when, the night is cold and dark[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
You can see, you can see light[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                 [ch]Bm[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]
 Cause no one can take away your right[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
To fight and to never surrender...[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]
To never surrender yeah[/tab]


[tab][ch]D[/ch]  [ch]F#m[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]
Oh time is all we're asking for[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]D[/ch]
To never surrender yeah[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]  [ch]F#m[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]A7[/ch]
Oh no no no no[/tab]

[Verse II]

[tab][ch]D[/ch]
Never surrender[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]
Never surrender[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]
Just stand your ground[/tab]
[tab][ch]A4[/ch]             [ch]A7[/ch]
Believe in yourself[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D[/ch]
When the night is cold[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]F#m[/ch]
And you fell down on your knees[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]
And you're looking for shelter and[/tab]
[tab][ch]A4[/ch]          [ch]A7[/ch]
Somebody to hear you, you're[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
Calling all angels[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]
Calling all angels[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
To receive you[/tab]
[tab][ch]A4[/ch]                [ch]A7[/ch]
To believe you my friend[/tab]
[tab][ch]A7[/ch]
And find your way back[/tab]
[tab][ch]A7[/ch]
Find your way back... Home[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]                             [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]
        Always find your way back home[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]              [ch]A7[/ch]
You can always find your way,[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]D[/ch]
back home[/tab]
